55: const COLUMN_MAP: Record<string, string> = {
56:   archived: "archived",
57:   assigneeId: "assignee_id",
58:   clientId: "client_id",
59:   description: "description",

64:   signedDate: "signed_date",
65:   startDate: "start_date",
66:   status: "status",
67:   title: "title",
68: };

70: const UPDATABLE_FIELDS = [
71:   "title",
72:   "description",
73:   "clientId",
74:   "assigneeId",
75:   "rmId",
76:   "startDate",
77:   "endDate",
78:   "signedDate",
79:   "pdfLink",
80:   "referenceNumber",
81:   "status",
82:   "archived",
83: ] as const;

85: const bdUser = alias(user, "bd_user");
86: const rmUser = alias(user, "rm_user");

88: async function recordContractEvent(
89:   contractId: number,
90:   field: string,
91:   oldValue: string | null,
92:   newValue: string | null,
93:   changedBy: string,
94: ) {
95:   await db.insert(contractEvents).values({
96:     changedBy,
97:     contractId,
98:     field,
99:     newValue,
100:     oldValue,
101:   });
102: }
103: 
104: function buildContractSelect() {
105:   return {
106:     archived: clientContracts.archived,
107:     assigneeId: clientContracts.assigneeId,
108:     bdImage: bdUser.image,
109:     bdName: bdUser.name,
110:     clientId: clientContracts.clientId,
111:     clientName: clients.name,
112:     createdAt: clientContracts.createdAt,
113:     description: clientContracts.description,
114:     endDate: clientContracts.endDate,
115:     id: clientContracts.id,
116:     pdfLink: clientContracts.pdfLink,
117:     referenceNumber: clientContracts.referenceNumber,
118:     rmId: clientContracts.rmId,
119:     rmImage: rmUser.image,
120:     rmName: rmUser.name,
121:     signedDate: clientContracts.signedDate,
122:     startDate: clientContracts.startDate,
123:     status: clientContracts.status,
124:     title: clientContracts.title,
125:     updatedAt: clientContracts.updatedAt,
126:   };
127: }
128: 
129: export async function createContract(
130:   input: CreateContractInput,
131:   userId: string,
132: ) {
133:   const [contract] = await db
134:     .insert(clientContracts)
135:     .values({
136:       assigneeId: input.assigneeId,
137:       clientId: input.clientId,
138:       description: input.description ?? null,
139:       endDate: input.endDate ?? null,
140:       pdfLink: input.pdfLink ?? null,
141:       referenceNumber: input.referenceNumber ?? null,
142:       rmId: input.rmId ?? null,
143:       signedDate: input.signedDate ?? null,
144:       startDate: input.startDate ?? null,
145:       status: input.status ?? "active",
146:       title: input.title,
147:     })
148:     .returning();
149: 
150:   const fieldsToRecord: [string, string | null][] = [
151:     ["title", input.title],
152:     ["description", input.description ?? null],
153:     ["client_id", input.clientId != null ? String(input.clientId) : null],
154:     ["assignee_id", input.assigneeId],
155:     ["rm_id", input.rmId ?? null],
156:     ["start_date", input.startDate ?? null],
157:     ["end_date", input.endDate ?? null],
158:     ["signed_date", input.signedDate ?? null],
159:     ["pdf_link", input.pdfLink ?? null],
160:     ["reference_number", input.referenceNumber ?? null],
161:     ["status", input.status ?? "active"],
162:   ];
163: 
164:   for (const [field, value] of fieldsToRecord) {
165:     if (value !== null) {
166:       await recordContractEvent(contract.id, field, null, value, userId);
167:     }
168:   }
169: 
170:   return getContract(contract.id);
171: }
172: 
173: export async function updateContract(
174:   id: number,
175:   input: UpdateContractInput,
176:   userId: string,
177: ) {
178:   const [existing] = await db
179:     .select()
180:     .from(clientContracts)
181:     .where(eq(clientContracts.id, id));
182: 
183:   if (!existing) throw new Error("Contract not found");
184: 
185:   const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {};
186: 
187:   for (const field of UPDATABLE_FIELDS) {
188:     if (input[field] !== undefined) {
189:       const oldVal = existing[field as keyof typeof existing];
190:       const newVal = input[field];
191: 
192:       const oldStr = oldVal === null ? null : String(oldVal);
193:       const newStr = newVal === null ? null : String(newVal);
194: 
195:       if (oldStr !== newStr) {
196:         updateData[field] = newVal;
197:         await recordContractEvent(
198:           id,
199:           COLUMN_MAP[field],
200:           oldStr,
201:           newStr,
202:           userId,
203:         );
204:       }
205:     }
206:   }
207: 
208:   if (Object.keys(updateData).length > 0) {
209:     updateData.updatedAt = new Date();
210:     await db
211:       .update(clientContracts)
212:       .set(updateData)
213:       .where(eq(clientContracts.id, id));
214:   }
215: 
216:   return getContract(id);
217: }
218: 
219: export async function archiveContract(id: number, userId: string) {
220:   return updateContract(id, { archived: true }, userId);
221: }
222: 
223: export async function getContract(id: number) {
224:   const [row] = await db
225:     .select(buildContractSelect())
226:     .from(clientContracts)
227:     .leftJoin(bdUser, eq(clientContracts.assigneeId, bdUser.id))
228:     .leftJoin(rmUser, eq(clientContracts.rmId, rmUser.id))
229:     .leftJoin(clients, eq(clientContracts.clientId, clients.id))
230:     .where(eq(clientContracts.id, id));
231: 
232:   if (!row) return null;
233: 
234:   return {
235:     ...row,
236:     bd: {
237:       id: row.assigneeId,
238:       image: row.bdImage,
239:       name: row.bdName,
240:     },
241:     client: {
242:       id: row.clientId,
243:       name: row.clientName,
244:     },
245:     rm: row.rmId
246:       ? { id: row.rmId, image: row.rmImage, name: row.rmName }
247:       : null,
248:   };
249: }
250: 
251: export async function listContracts(input: ListContractsInput = {}) {
252:   const {
253:     filters = {},
254:     limit = 20,
255:     sortBy = "createdAt",
256:     sortOrder = "desc",
257:   } = input;
258: 
259:   const conditions = [];
260: 
261:   if (filters.archived !== undefined) {
262:     conditions.push(eq(clientContracts.archived, filters.archived));
263:   } else {
264:     conditions.push(eq(clientContracts.archived, false));
265:   }
266: 
267:   if (filters.clientId !== undefined) {
268:     conditions.push(eq(clientContracts.clientId, filters.clientId));
269:   }
270: 
271:   if (filters.status?.length) {
272:     conditions.push(inArray(clientContracts.status, filters.status));
273:   }
274: 
275:   if (filters.assigneeId?.length) {
276:     conditions.push(inArray(clientContracts.assigneeId, filters.assigneeId));
277:   }
278: 
279:   if (filters.search) {
280:     const pattern = `%${filters.search}%`;
281:     conditions.push(
282:       sql`(${ilike(clientContracts.title, pattern)} OR ${ilike(clientContracts.referenceNumber, pattern)})`,
283:     );
284:   }
285: 
286:   const cursorId = input.cursor ? Number.parseInt(input.cursor, 10) : null;
287:   if (cursorId !== null && !Number.isNaN(cursorId)) {
288:     if (sortOrder === "asc") {
289:       conditions.push(sql`${clientContracts.id} > ${cursorId}`);
290:     } else {
291:       conditions.push(sql`${clientContracts.id} < ${cursorId}`);
292:     }
293:   }
294: 
295:   const whereClause = conditions.length > 0 ? and(...conditions) : undefined;
296: 
297:   const sortColumn =
298:     sortBy === "title"
299:       ? clientContracts.title
300:       : sortBy === "startDate"
301:         ? clientContracts.startDate
302:         : sortBy === "endDate"
303:           ? clientContracts.endDate
304:           : clientContracts.createdAt;
305: 
306:   const orderFn = sortOrder === "asc" ? asc(sortColumn) : desc(sortColumn);
307: 
308:   const rows = await db
309:     .select(buildContractSelect())
310:     .from(clientContracts)
311:     .leftJoin(bdUser, eq(clientContracts.assigneeId, bdUser.id))
312:     .leftJoin(rmUser, eq(clientContracts.rmId, rmUser.id))
313:     .leftJoin(clients, eq(clientContracts.clientId, clients.id))
314:     .where(whereClause)
315:     .orderBy(orderFn)
316:     .limit(limit + 1);
317: 
318:   const hasMore = rows.length > limit;
319:   const items = hasMore ? rows.slice(0, limit) : rows;
320: 
321:   const enriched = items.map((row) => ({
322:     ...row,
323:     bd: {
324:       id: row.assigneeId,
325:       image: row.bdImage,
326:       name: row.bdName,
327:     },
328:     client: {
329:       id: row.clientId,
330:       name: row.clientName,
331:     },
332:     rm: row.rmId
333:       ? { id: row.rmId, image: row.rmImage, name: row.rmName }
334:       : null,
335:   }));
336: 
337:   const nextCursor =
338:     hasMore && enriched.length > 0
339:       ? String(enriched[enriched.length - 1].id)
340:       : null;
341: 
342:   return { items: enriched, nextCursor };
343: }
344: 
345: export async function listContractEvents(
346:   contractId: number,
347:   _cursor?: string,
348:   limit = 50,
349: ) {
350:   const rows = await db
351:     .select()
352:     .from(contractEvents)
353:     .where(eq(contractEvents.contractId, contractId))
354:     .orderBy(desc(contractEvents.changedAt))
355:     .limit(limit + 1);
356: 
357:   const hasMore = rows.length > limit;
358:   const items = hasMore ? rows.slice(0, limit) : rows;
359: 
360:   return {
361:     items,
362:     nextCursor:
363:       hasMore && items.length > 0 ? String(items[items.length - 1].id) : null,
364:   };
365: }
